licence: BIMobject download — Armitage Shanks supplied geometry, personal/professional use
conversion_notes: File placed directly into library. IFC2X3 schema; PredefinedType NOTDEFINED in file (corrected to WASHHANDBASIN in product.json). IfcBoundingBox present but values are 1000× too small due to a BIMobject-Lena unit conversion bug; actual dimensions taken from ePset_BIMobject_BO properties instead. Note: product is branded '55cm' but actual ceramic width is 547mm — product.json uses the measured 547mm. No IfcClassificationReference entities present in file. Geometry identical to S2478 (1-taphole variant) — taphole count difference is not visible in IFC2X3 FacetedBrep at this LOD.
